name: ELEVATE
short_description: Offroad Driving Skills + A Weekly $392 Contest... Welcome to ELEVATE, the game that PAYS YOU back.
detailed_description:
ELEVATE is an Offroad Driving Game where Driving Skill puts you on top the leaderboard!

In Elevate everyone has the same car.

There are no boosts or add-ons to make your car faster.

You can’t buy your way to the top.

No one is faster than anyone else.

ELEVATE is a game of skill.

PLAY ELEVATE, WIN THE WEEKLY $392!

$3,920 won so far!

Every Thursday @ 0800 UTC:

ELEVATE kicks all players currently playing and closes the game.

While the game is closed:

Leaderboard results are pulled and Stars are distributed to the Top 3 Players of Every Event.

The island is transformed to a new terrain.

New event locations are populated.

All leaderboards are reset to zero.

When the game reopens:

the island is new, the event locations are new and all leaderboards have been reset to zero.

The Stars won are worth money on the Steam Community Market.
Winner: Gold Star worth $50!
Second: Silver Star worth $5!
Third: Bronze Star worth $1!

ELEVATE has 7 Events which means there’s $392 in prizes available Every Week!

If you’re one of the Top 3 in an Event(s), Star(s) will be placed in your inventory when the game reopens.

Players can then put their Star(s) up for sale on the Steam Community Market and we’ll buy them back from you!

(If a player does not place a Star for sale, we can’t buy it.)

(If a player puts their Star up for more than it’s worth, we won’t buy it. You will have to cancel the sale and relist to the correct price)

Once all the Stars have been distributed, all Leaderboards will be reset and a new map with new Event locations will be available.

This means there is a new game of ELEVATE with new Leaderboards and a new chance to WIN EVERY WEEK!

// Online contest laws vary by state/country, and the law in the state/country in which any given participant in the contest lives is the law that applies. Therefore, this contest is void where prohibited.

// Steam takes 15% of every Community Market sale, so the actual amount players will receive for their Gold Star is around $43.49 depending on local taxes.

Play ELEVATE, Lead, Win!

How to sell a Star back to us:

Click on your inventory:

Select the Star you want to sell back to us:

Ensure you put the appropriate amount in the BUYER PAYS box:

In some cases Steam will put a hold on your Star to prevent theft. This is beyond our control, but as soon as your Star is available to buy, we'll buy it.

Once we buy your Star, your account is credited... winner, winner.

That's how the $392 works.

Now go out there and win some Stars!
